title: Element Binding
description: Binding record mapping repo elements to Kling Library @Aliases and Kling-native audio readiness. This record separates Kling production concerns (kling_alias, speaker_mapping, voice_capability, native_audio_readiness) from element view planning (element_view_plan.schema.json). No lifecycle keys (pack_status, canon_lock, approved, locked, selected) permitted.

schema_version.description: Pre-1.0 draft. Promoted to 1.0 after B0/B1/B2 feedback loop closes.

element_id.description: Element identifier: C01, LOC001, PROP003, WD001, STYLE001, etc.

element_type.description: Type of element being bound to Kling.

source_element_view_plan_ref.description: Relative path to the corresponding element_view_plan.yaml that defines the element's views and retrofit status.

kling_alias.description: Kling Library element reference. Regex requires leading @ and alphanumeric/underscore characters only. Example: @Nadia, @NadiaWD001, @KitchenPassage.

binding_status.description: planned: Kling asset does not yet exist. created: Kling asset exists but not voice-capable. voice_capable: Asset exists and can voice dialogue. voice_locked: Asset is ready for final voice-locked SC0001 generation.

voice_capability.description: none: element has no voice capability. video_ref: voice exists as video reference, not directly generatable. audio_ref: voice exists as audio reference, not directly generatable. library_provided: Kling Element Library provides voice-capable asset.

native_audio_readiness.description: not_required: element has no dialogue. blocked: element needs voice but Kling-native voice not available. metadata_only: voice info recorded but not yet integrated. ready: element is voice-ready for SC0001 generation.

enabled.description: True if this element uses Kling-native audio.

provider_policy.description: Audio must originate from Kling Element Library or Kling-compatible sources only. No external voice synthesis.

external_tts_allowed.description: External text-to-speech is never permitted. Must be false.

adr_vendor_allowed.description: Automated dialogue replacement (ADR) via external vendor is never permitted. Must be false.

speaker_mapping.description: Maps character elements to speaker aliases and dialogue readiness. Optional; used only when dialogue is present.

dialogue_required.description: True if this character must speak in SC0001.

native_audio_readiness.description: Voice readiness state for this speaker specifically.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about this binding, including voice provisioning status and any blockers.
